metadata.bucket_rule: Buckets are grouped by mob level in 5-level ranges for the app: bucket = Math.floor((level - 1) / 5) + 1. Bucket 1=1-5, 2=6-10, 3=11-15, 4=16-20, and so on.
metadata.note: Each bucket's loot_pool is the deduplicated union of all loot listed on mobs in that 5-level bucket. Individual mob loot is preserved under each mob for verification.
